speaker: speaker1
text: How do you think they could be ended ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't think that there is any easy way . The United Nations could send peacekeepers into the country . At least then the warring parties could be forced to negotiate .

speaker: speaker1
text: So , if the cause is poverty , there should be a program to make the country richer.If the problem is resources , share them .

speaker: speaker2
text: It sounds easy when you say it like that . In reality , it's harder to make peace between countries .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , it is.One way to stop countries fighting is to cut off their financial support . Wars are very expensive .
